ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date the show aired */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the game during the show */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number for each episode */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host of the show */,
  "viewership" INTEGER /* Number of viewers for the episode */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Nielsen ratings for the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show episode */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the question was last updated */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer who created the question */,
  "is_daily_double" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is a Daily Double */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES question_writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the writer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the writer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the writer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the writer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the producer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the producer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the producer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_approval" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval event */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being approved */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer who approved the question */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the question was approved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the approval process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the approval was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the approval was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_approval_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_approval_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., writer, producer, analyst, fan) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the question */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)
